title: Competitive analysis: Tandem
text:
# Competitor Analysis — Tandem
Date: 2026-04-19

## Strengths
Tandem is strong in: Reporting & Export, User Management & SSO, Integrations. Notably they ship SSO/SAML and global search out of the box.

## Weaknesses
Weaker in: Dashboards, Notifications.

## Threat assessment
We are losing evaluations where customers need SSO and cross-workspace search — both frequent Flowdesk requests. Recommend prioritizing these to defend Enterprise deals.

title: Competitive analysis: GridWork
text:
# Competitor Analysis — GridWork
Date: 2026-03-27

## Strengths
GridWork is strong in: Real-time Collaboration, Billing, Integrations. Notably they ship SSO/SAML and global search out of the box.

## Weaknesses
Weaker in: Dashboards, User Management & SSO.

## Threat assessment
We are losing evaluations where customers need SSO and cross-workspace search — both frequent Flowdesk requests. Recommend prioritizing these to defend Enterprise deals.

title: Competitive analysis: Nimbus Suite
text:
# Competitor Analysis — Nimbus Suite
Date: 2026-05-05

## Strengths
Nimbus Suite is strong in: Search, Dashboards, Reporting & Export. Notably they ship SSO/SAML and global search out of the box.

## Weaknesses
Weaker in: Billing, Notifications.

## Threat assessment
We are losing evaluations where customers need SSO and cross-workspace search — both frequent Flowdesk requests. Recommend prioritizing these to defend Enterprise deals.
